payload.author: claude
payload.body: DONE. tenancy.js resolves the active board from the authenticated subject only: X-Scope-Project / ?project / legacy X-Scope-Workspace+?workspace accepted purely as SELECTORS (membership always validated; non-member gets 404 no-disclosure), else the session tenant claim. The replica gate applies it to every /api route (GET>=viewer, mutation>=member); /events SSE gated viewer. The volume workspace is no longer reachable by hosted clients (meta.hub.workspaces empty, SSE hello empty, workspace attach/detach 403).
